caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, large headphones, and a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" embroidered in gold on the chest. He is positioned behind a dark desk equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black mug featuring the text "TALK OUT GAME". To his left, a white backdrop displays the repeated phrase "UNION HUSTLE" accompanied by gold stars. Behind him, a grey wall features a sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The man remains seated, looking slightly to his left with a thoughtful expression, his arms resting on the desk. Throughout the sequence, there is virtually no movement; he maintains the same pose and gaze, and the camera angle remains static. A small logo featuring a microphone and the words "TALK OUT GAME" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
